summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LMS backend APIs and frontend UI. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Registration, Login, Course listing, Topic content all working. Admin dashboard has session persistence issue.

minor.issue: Route order conflict fixed - announcements route was being matched by /{forum_id} route

integration_issues.issue: After login, navigating to /coursework/admin redirects back to login page. Token is stored in localStorage but session not persisting across page navigation.

action_items: Investigate admin dashboard session persistence - token is stored but page redirects to login on navigation
Add data-testid attributes to login form inputs for better test automation
critical_code_review_comments: Route order in forums.py was causing /announcements to be matched by /{forum_id} - FIXED by moving announcements routes before the dynamic route
Login form inputs use placeholder selectors instead of name attributes - consider adding name attributes for form handling

success_rate.frontend: 80% (Registration, Login, Courses, Topics working; Admin dashboard has navigation issue)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully tested and working. Frontend registration and course viewing work. Admin dashboard has session issue - token stored but page redirects to login. Quiz and Forum UI not tested due to time constraints but APIs verified working.

backend: Authentication (login instructor/admin, invalid credentials, get me)
User management (get all users, pending users, approve user)
Courses (get all, get by slug, get topics)
Quizzes (get published, get managed, create quiz)
Forums (get forums, create forum, create post auth check)
Notifications (get with auth, get without auth, unread count)
frontend: Registration page - form submission and success message
Login page - credential entry and redirect
Course topics page - 9 topics for Data Structures
Topic content page - content and navigation

mocked_services.email: SMTP email service is MOCKED - no real emails sent without SMTP credentials configured
